name: Jaw Release
instructions: Close your mouth and move your jaw as if you are chewing gum.
Breathe in deeply through your nose, then slowly breathe out while humming.
Open your mouth wide with your tongue pressed against your lower teeth.
Hold for 5 seconds. Relax and repeat.
benefits: Tones jawline, reduces double chin, stretches facial and neck muscles.

name: Fish Face
instructions: Suck in your cheeks and lips to make a fish-face expression.
Try to smile while holding this position.
Hold for 5 seconds, then relax.
benefits: Tones and stretches cheek muscles, reduces chubby cheeks.

name: Cheek Puffs
instructions: Inhale deeply and fill your mouth with air.
Transfer the air from one cheek to the other alternately.
Hold for 5 seconds on each side, then exhale slowly.
benefits: Tones cheek muscles and reduces puffiness.

name: Neck Roll
instructions: Sit straight and tilt your head to the right side.
Slowly roll your head down to the front, then to the left.
Continue rolling in a full circle. Repeat in the opposite direction.
Keep your shoulders relaxed and down.
benefits: Tones neck and chin area, improves posture, reduces double chin.

name: Chin Lift
instructions: Tilt your head back to look up at the ceiling.
Pucker up your lips as if you are going to kiss the ceiling.
Hold for 5 seconds, then relax.
benefits: Specifically targets double chin and neck fat.

name: Forehead Smoother
instructions: Place both hands on your forehead with fingers spread out.
Slowly sweep your fingers outward across your forehead applying gentle pressure.
Relax and repeat.
benefits: Tones upper facial muscles and reduces forehead tension.

name: Eyebrow Raiser
instructions: Open your eyes wide, raising your eyebrows as high as possible.
Hold for 5 seconds, then slowly lower your brows.
Repeat while maintaining a relaxed face.
benefits: Tones brow and forehead area, creates a more alert appearance.

name: Mouthwash Exercise
instructions: Fill your mouth with air.
Transfer the air under your upper lip, then your left cheek, then your lower lip, then your right cheek.
Continue rotating for 30 seconds then exhale.
benefits: Works all cheek muscles simultaneously, very effective for reducing cheek fat.

name: Tongue Stretch
instructions: Look straight ahead and stick your tongue out as far as possible.
Lift your tongue upward toward your nose.
Hold for 10 seconds, then relax.
benefits: Tones neck and chin muscles, directly targets double chin.

name: Smile Smoother
instructions: Hide your teeth with your lips and make an O shape.
Smile as wide as you can while keeping the O shape, then hold for 5 seconds.
Place your index finger on your chin and move your jaw up and down gently.
benefits: Lifts cheek muscles and tones nasolabial area.
